title: Citi Sky’s AI Reshapes Wealth Management
description: Citi wants its AI to talk money 24/7—just don’t expect it to replace your wealth advisor’s judgment anytime soon. The post Citi Sky’s AI Reshapes Wealth Management appeared first on Global Finance Magazine .

title: Sony’s explanation for its embarrassing AI photos just leaves more questions
description: Sony has responded after getting roasted online over its new AI camera tool.

title: Raspberry Pi founder warns AI hype could deter people from tech careers and worsen skills shortage
description: Overhyped AI claims risk pushing young people away from tech careers, Raspberry Pi founder Eben Upton warns. Inflated predictions of job losses could worsen an existing skills shortage, he told the BBC.

title: AI agents show they can create exploits, not just find vulns
SpaceX may become first true AI infrastructure megacap liquidity event: Plexo's Toney
description: CNBC's "Closing Bell" discusses Cerebras' IPO, the potential of SpaceX's IPO and more with Lo Toney, founding managing partner of Plexo Capital and a CNBC contributor.
